name: SearchConditionOptions
summary: Options that modify SearchCondition matching behavior

enum_values.name: IgnoreCategoryDisplayName
enum_values.summary: Do not compare DisplayName when looking for matching category

enum_values.name: IgnoreCategoryName
enum_values.summary: Do not compare Name when looking for matching category

enum_values.name: IgnorePropertyDisplayName
enum_values.summary: Do not compare DisplayName when looking for matching property

enum_values.name: IgnoreDisplayNames
enum_values.summary: Do not compare DisplayName when looking for matching category or property

enum_values.name: IgnorePropertyName
enum_values.summary: Do not compare Name when looking for matching property

enum_values.name: IgnoreNames
enum_values.summary: Do not compare Name when looking for matching category or property

enum_values.name: IgnoreDisplayStringValueCase
enum_values.summary: Ignore case when comparing DisplayString values

enum_values.name: NegateCondition
enum_values.summary: Negate the sense of the condition

enum_values.name: StartGroup
enum_values.summary: When used in a SearchConditionCollection, marks the start of a group of conditions. Collection matches if any group of conditions matches.

enum_values.name: IgnoreDisplayStringValueAccents
enum_values.summary: Ignore accents when comparing DisplayString values

enum_values.name: IgnoreDisplayStringCharWidths
enum_values.summary: Ignore character width when comparing DisplayString values
